title: Pappapappa Lyrics Papparappa Lyrics Vettai single songs lyrics
stanzas:
Pappappapan pappapaan Pappappa pappapaan
pathikichu pambaram doi
Pappappa pappapaan Pappappa pappapaan
Enna senja mandhiram doi

Adi raasaathi rosaapu enna solla
en raa thookkam thookikittu porapulla
Naan thillaanaa paaduren thimuraaga aaduren
ennoda kaikhokka vaadi..
Un pollaadha meesayil kuthaaama kuthunaa
sethaa naan poven poda ..

Ye Pappappappan pappapaan Pappappa pappapaan
pathikichu pambaram doi
Papparappa pappapaan Pappappa pappapaan
Enna senja mandhiram doi

Ye kodi idai paathu naan odanchiten nethu
Mutham kitham thandhu enna otta vaiyen di

Vallayadi vallai enna vazha vaiyyu naalai
mothamaaga mootakatti thooki poyenda

Appadiye uppumoota thokkikireb de
adi 5-u 6-u aasa mattum theethukiren de
Oththukuren oththukuren ne onnonnaa
sollithandha kathuthukuren da  .... (Pappappappa pappapaan ...)

Ye manjam mugam paathu naan sevandhuten nethu
mainaave manjakodi kaatu ennaku
Ye vidu kadha venaam ne vidum kadhai venaam
enna venum kanna paathu solllu ennaku

Un poo potta paavaada podhum ennaku
Adhil velli vizha padam kaata aasai iruku
Oththukuren oththukuren naan unnoda
paapaava pethuthukuren da ...

Pappappappa pappapaan Pappappa pappapaan
suthukichu pambaram doi
Pappappa pappapaan Pappappa pappapaan
kathukichu mandhiram doi

Adi raasaathi rosaapu enna solla
en raa thookaam thookikittu porapulla
Naan thillaanaa paaduren thimuraaga aaduren
ennoda kaikhokka vaadi..
Un pollaadha meesayil kuthaaama kuthunaa
sethaa naan poven po po poda ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pappapappa?

The song Pappapappa conveys a lively and playful vibe, celebrating joy and dance.

What is the context of this song in the movie Vettai?

In Vettai, the song captures a festive atmosphere, showcasing the characters enjoying life and celebrating together.

Who are the singers and music director of Pappapappa?

The song is sung by Yuvan Shankar Raja and Renu, with music composed by Yuvan himself.

When was Pappapappa released?

Pappapappa was released on December 13, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Pappapappa from Vettai is an energetic duet that encapsulates the spirit of celebration and joy. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, it invites listeners to dance and enjoy life. The vibrant collaboration between Yuvan Shankar Raja and Renu adds a unique charm, making it a standout track in the film. This song perfectly conveys the emotions of happiness and festivity, resonating with audiences looking for a lively musical experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pappapappa from the Vettai soundtrack is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring the dynamic vocals of Yuvan Shankar Raja and Renu. With Yuvan's signature beats and catchy lyrics by Na Muthukumar, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious rhythm that makes Pappapappa a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Pappappappa, Pappappa, I heard something, oh! Pappappa, Pappappa, what spell did you cast?
Oh my dear, what should I say? I am feeling sleepy and going out. I am singing without stopping, dancing freely, so hold my hand. Your beautiful mustache is making me feel dizzy, I will leave now.
Pappappappa, Pappappa, I heard something, oh! Pappappa, Pappappa, what spell did you cast?
Yesterday, I saw this girl and ran away. She gave me a kiss and I felt shy.
Oh, what should I do? Tomorrow, I will take the whole day off and leave.
I am just going to keep it simple, I am only thinking about 5 or 6 things. I am holding on, holding on, and you are telling me stories... (Pappappappa, Pappappa...)
Yesterday, I looked at your face and felt like I was dreaming. I don't want to hear any stories, I just want to know what you want to say.
If you put your flower on me, that's enough for me. I want to see the silver moon in it. I am holding on, holding on, I am raising your child...
Pappappappa, Pappappa, I heard something, oh! Pappappa, Pappappa, what spell did you cast?
Oh my dear, what should I say? I am feeling sleepy and going out. I am singing without stopping, dancing freely, so hold my hand. Your beautiful mustache is making me feel dizzy, I will leave now.
